reapack.name: ACID Pro Native Grid.lua
reapack.desc: Native ACID Pro-calibrated adaptive grid and 24-step zoom

metadata.description:
ACID Pro-calibrated native grid for REAPER.
Installs two Main-section actions: - ACID Pro native grid - toggle full ACID mode (toolbar) - ACID Pro native grid - 24-step mousewheel zoom (legacy)
The toolbar mode captures the wheel directly over the arrange view, so no Mousewheel shortcut or Mouse Modifier is required. No overlay windows or custom graphics are used. REAPER handles grid drawing, snapping, loop points, time selections and edit-cursor interaction natively.

version.author: 2TDaSerra, OpenAI Codex
version.changelog: Initial ReaPack release. - Add 24 ACID Pro-calibrated zoom levels. - Add hard zoom-in and zoom-out limits. - Change the native project-grid division at every level. - Add an optional lightweight background synchronizer.

version.author: 2TDaSerra, OpenAI Codex
version.changelog: - Make toolbar toggle the recommended no-setup mode. - Follow every native REAPER horizontal zoom method automatically. - Show the toolbar button as enabled while adaptive grid is running. - Keep the 24-step mousewheel zoom as an optional hard-limit mode.

version.author: 2TDaSerra, OpenAI Codex
version.changelog: - Make the toolbar button enable the complete ACID mode. - Capture Mousewheel directly over the arrange view through js_ReaScriptAPI. - Remove the need to assign Mousewheel in Actions or edit Mouse Modifiers. - Apply the exact 24-step ACID zoom ladder and both hard limits. - Release Mousewheel immediately when the toolbar mode is disabled.
